question: How many more runs did the leading run-scorer of IPL 2016 make than the leading run-scorer of IPL 2007/08?
reference: IPL 2016 top scorer V Kohli (973); IPL 2007/08 top scorer SE Marsh (616); difference 357.

question: How many more runs did the leading run-scorer of IPL 2015 make than the leading run-scorer of IPL 2011?
reference: IPL 2015 top scorer DA Warner (562); IPL 2011 top scorer CH Gayle (608); difference -46.

question: How many more runs did the leading run-scorer of IPL 2019 make than the leading run-scorer of IPL 2009?
reference: IPL 2019 top scorer DA Warner (692); IPL 2009 top scorer ML Hayden (572); difference 120.

question: Consider the bowler with the most Test wickets in the database. In cricket, is underarm bowling permitted?
reference: Underarm bowling is not permitted unless both captains agree before the match (MCC Law 21.1.2). The stats step only identifies the bowler; the rule is the answer.

question: For the team that won the most recent India–England Test series, how many fielders are allowed outside the fielding circle during the first powerplay of an ODI?
reference: The 2025 series was drawn 2-2 (stats). In ODI Powerplay 1, no more than 2 fielders are permitted outside the 30-yard circle (ICC ODI playing conditions, clause 28.7).
